title: A Yank in the RAF
writer: Darrell Ware, Karl Tunberg, Darryl F. Zanuck
actors: Tyrone Power, Betty Grable, John Sutton
plot: An American pilot impulsively joins His Majesty's Royal Air Force in Britain in an attempt to impress his ex-girlfriend.
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 1 win & 1 nomination total
